question: Q5 - Where did I get to? (Final Analysis)

critical_issues_addressed: Removed crisis framing exaggeration ('nearly destroyed my venture' → 'underperformed my potential')
Added ethical dimension to delegation failure ('denied Sam growth opportunities' = ethically wrong)
Admitted accountability mechanism failure (£350 paid, 7 failures = 'pain alone isn't working')
Removed 'understanding without action' shield (admits meta-avoidance: 'can articulate eloquently while continuing to avoid')

crisis_framing.v05_problem: 'Nearly destroyed my venture' when business achieved £6,200/month
crisis_framing.v06_solution: 'Business survived (£6,200/month achieved), but I underperformed my potential'

ethical_dimension.v05_problem: Delegation framed as trust/control issue only
ethical_dimension.v06_solution: Added 'denied Sam growth opportunities = ethically wrong, not just poor leadership'

accountability_reality.v05_problem: Claimed £50 penalty 'is finally changing my behaviour' despite £350 = 7 failures
accountability_reality.v06_solution: Admitted 'mechanism failed... pain alone isn't changing my behaviour'

understanding_shield.v05_problem: Got credit for 'understanding without action' while admitting no change
understanding_shield.v06_solution: Removed clever line, admits 'can articulate eloquently while continuing to avoid'

notes: V06 addresses all 4 critical issues identified in assessment while preserving v05's strengths (brutal honesty, team feedback, quantification, real consequences). Key improvement: removed all defensive framing and meta-avoidance. Admits when accountability mechanisms aren't working. Adds ethical dimension to delegation failure. Tones down crisis exaggeration to match business reality. The result is more credible because it's more accurate.
